info.title: Auto-Offensive API Gateway
info.description: FastAPI gateway proxying requests to Go gRPC micro-services.

get.summary: List all projects for current user

post.description:
Create a new API key for a project.

The returned `plain_key` is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.
Store it securely in your CI/CD pipeline.
Validate an API key and check if it has permissions for a specific action.
Revoke an API key, immediately invalidating it.

parameters.name: key_id

schema.description: ID of the key to revoke
schema.title: Key Id

parameters.description: ID of the key to revoke

get.summary: List API keys for a project
get.description:
List all API keys for a project.

Set `active_only=true` to only return keys that haven't been revoked.
Get details of a specific API key.

get.summary: Get advanced findings for a job
Get advanced findings for a step
Get advanced step parsed data for table rendering
Get parsed data for all steps in a job
get.description:
Returns structured table data for every completed step in a job,
ordered by step_order. Steps with no data (pending/failed) are omitted.
Columns are derived from each tool's output_schema; unknown fields are
placed in discovered_columns for client-side 'Extra Fields' grouping.

get.summary: Stream advanced step logs over SSE

post.summary: Submit basic scan and stream output

get.summary: Get basic findings for a job

post.description:
Submit a medium scan with admin-allowed options.

Users can provide options from the tool's scan_config.medium schema.
The go-server validates these options against the allowed schema,
applies defaults, and builds CLI flags accordingly.

get.summary: Stream medium scan step logs over SSE

post.description:
Trigger a new code scan on a repository.

The scan is queued asynchronously and processed by the worker.
Use the returned scan_id to stream progress or fetch results.

get.description: Get the current status and progress of a scan.

Stream real-time progress updates via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

The stream will automatically close when the scan reaches a terminal state
(SUCCESS, FAILED, or PARTIAL).
Get the summary of a completed scan (quality gates, metrics, etc.).

List code issues found in a scan.

Supports filtering by type (BUG, VULNERABILITY, CODE_SMELL, etc.)
and severity (BLOCKER, CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR, INFO).
Get detailed information about a specific issue, including history and metadata.
Get all issues found in a specific file.

List dependency vulnerabilities and outdated packages found in a scan.

Supports filtering by:
- tool: OWASP or TRIVY
- severity: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO
- ecosystems: GO, PYTHON, NODE, JAVA, etc. (comma-separated)
- outdated_only: Show only outdated dependencies
- vulnerable_only: Show only vulnerable dependencies
Get a summary of dependency findings (CVEs, outdated packages, licenses).
Get all scans for a project, with pagination.

APIKeyListResponse.title: APIKeyListResponse
APIKeyListResponse.description: Response containing a list of API keys.

preset.title: Preset
preset.description: Preset name to apply. Use the exact name from the tool's scan_config.basic.presets (e.g. 'top-ports', 'service-detect') or the generic aliases 'light' / 'deep'. Defaults to the first available preset when omitted.

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: List of scopes for the key

CreateAPIKeyRequest.title: CreateAPIKeyRequest
CreateAPIKeyRequest.description: Request to create a new API key.

CreateAPIKeyResponse.title: CreateAPIKeyResponse
CreateAPIKeyResponse.description: Response after creating an API key.

version.title: Version
version.description: Version string e.g. '7.94'. Created if not found.

shadow_output_config.description: Shadow output configuration for dynamic tool execution

parser_config.description: Optional parser configuration used to extract structured rows and findings

JobParsedDataResponse.title: JobParsedDataResponse
JobParsedDataResponse.description: Aggregated parsed data for all steps in a job, ordered by step_order.

tool_options.title: Tool Options
tool_options.description: User-supplied medium scan options for this step

tool_options.title: Tool Options
tool_options.description: User-supplied medium scan options (keyed by option key name)

RevokeAPIKeyResponse.title: RevokeAPIKeyResponse
RevokeAPIKeyResponse.description: Response after revoking an API key.

preferred_format.title: Preferred Format
preferred_format.description: Default structured output format key to use from the formats map

formats.title: Formats
formats.description: Per-format transport metadata used for internal flag injection

default_path.title: Default Path
default_path.description: Default directory for shadow output files

parse_timeout_seconds.title: Parse Timeout Seconds
parse_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for parsing shadow output after tool completion

fallback_to_stdout.title: Fallback To Stdout
fallback_to_stdout.description: If true, parse stdout when file output fails

is_streaming.title: Is Streaming
is_streaming.description: If true, stream logs to Redis in real-time

json_flag.title: Json Flag
json_flag.description: Legacy stdout-format enable flag retained for backward compatibility

file_flag.title: File Flag
file_flag.description: Legacy file-output flag retained for backward compatibility

alternative_formats.title: Alternative Formats
alternative_formats.description: Legacy alternative format list retained for backward compatibility

ShadowOutputConfig.title: ShadowOutputConfig
ShadowOutputConfig.description: Configuration for shadow output pattern - allows dynamic tool execution without code changes

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: How the selected format is produced by the tool

enable_flags.title: Enable Flags
enable_flags.description: Additional flags injected before execution, e.g. ['-json']

path_flag.title: Path Flag
path_flag.description: Flag used to pass an output path when transport='file'

parser.title: Parser
parser.description: Parser family to use when consuming the captured output

path_mode.title: Path Mode
path_mode.description: Whether file output expects a full file path or a basename

file_extension.title: File Extension
file_extension.description: Suggested file extension for generated outputs, e.g. '.xml'

use_gvisor.title: Use Gvisor
use_gvisor.description: Override whether this tool should run under gVisor

network_mode.title: Network Mode
network_mode.description: Optional Docker network mode override for this tool

privileged.title: Privileged
privileged.description: Whether this tool requires privileged execution

cap_add.title: Cap Add
cap_add.description: Optional Linux capabilities to add for tools that need raw socket access

ValidateAPIKeyRequest.title: ValidateAPIKeyRequest
ValidateAPIKeyRequest.description: Request to validate an API key.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Project ID associated with the key

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: List of scopes for the key

key_id.title: Key Id
key_id.description: Key ID when validation matched a stored API key

ValidateAPIKeyResponse.title: ValidateAPIKeyResponse
ValidateAPIKeyResponse.description: Response after validating an API key.
